calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Off Calendar

Notice And Application For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332. Telephone #415 250 2926.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, American Express Bank, FSB, a federal savings bank.
Declaration submitted and filed in support of Request for Entry of Default Judgment are admitted in evidence.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Demetrius L. James, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $32,696.16
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $515.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,211.16
Judgment signed in open court.
